nasb.text: A sword against the oracle priests, and they will become fools! A sword against her mighty men, and they will be shattered!

esv.text: A sword against the diviners, that they may become fools! A sword against her warriors, that they may be destroyed!

cnv.text: “刀劍必攻擊胡說八道的假先知， 他們必變成愚昧； 刀劍必攻擊它的勇士， 他們必驚惶失措；

ccb.text: 敌人要攻击巴比伦的假先知， 使他们显出愚昧； 敌人要攻击巴比伦的勇士， 使他们充满恐惧；
